str_EBEAD3F5: Sea waves lazily glided across the water's surface, occasionally breaking against the shore with white foam.
str_B793D02A: From afar came the cries of seagulls guarding this unbreakable calm, not allowing one to completely dissolve into it.
str_84C74F13: I felt the moonlight gently caress my body, how the scent of salt filled everything with freshness, how the sounds of the sea, like a song, beckoned me into its boundless bosom.
str_A77908F4: The scattered canvas of stars – a map leading straight into the darkness.
str_00B66C42: Only now did I begin to understand that this darkness was calling me to it.
str_F9947903: The sea attracted me, mesmerized me with its mystery.
str_AD9F66F8: Guided by its serenade, I walked closer and closer to the water.
str_48A4C4B4: I felt something familiar... or someone who seemed so close.
str_D1D7CA04: Like a marionette, I followed an unknown force by the moonlight paving the road to oblivion.
str_65737810: The road on which I lost my sense of self.
str_94FCF807: This sensation, understanding, feeling, had now become a luxury for me.
str_290C8E89: I slowly submerged into the water column.
str_8C113ACA: Each step pierced my body like a thousand needles, but instead of a scream, only a quiet song escaped my lips.
str_BA4C7A1B: The water around turned red – the color of my blood, oozing from my legs, cut by the coastal rocks.
str_B0DAD4F4: Blood and water – it seems this is my new abode.
str_1E43D168: A painfully familiar whisper burst into my head.
str_03271F52: This was the same whisper I heard in the forest, buried alive.
str_C302ADC5: The whisper grew closer and closer. Or maybe it was inside me all along.
str_D99A563A: My lips parted and, greedily gulping air, twisted in an attempt to utter...
str_EA9394C2: These words finally brought me to my senses.
str_3A7078A0: And I was able to make out...
str_B8A356F1: Yes, and you are not. Why is that?
str_C15933B0: Really? I think you do know...
str_80A48061: And... Probably, you should be in my place.
str_2D2D9451: I want you to leave me alone.
str_7F5B1E80: You always only manipulated me, used me, got me into trouble.
str_C80D7B6D: And even now, I'm alone in a foreign city.
str_2E096D6E: I'm a murder suspect because you dragged me here...
str_A18685CA: I can't handle this. I can't be alone.
str_E58F4BB0: My voice broke into a scream, and tears fell from my eyes.
str_C55DF50B: The corners of Miranda's lips curled up on her bluish face.
str_A578DB10: It was that same smile she had bestowed upon me since childhood for my failures.
str_49E1546D: That smile hiding her enjoyment of my despair.
str_1C42C519: Don't feel sorry for yourself, sweetie.
str_F1204A05: You are so close. How quickly you find an approach to men when you need to.
str_43E96C5B: You didn't look so pathetic when you were hanging all over Mark.
str_99618AB6: You looked like a rare bitch who deserves everything that's happening.
str_EE426994: Maybe because you were never needed by anyone except me?
str_56F5FF50: Shut up like you did when you didn't say a word about the night of my death?
str_6372C0C3: You don't remember? Or don't want to remember?
str_0CC6FBB8: The corners of her lips curled into a smile again.
str_B37C0094: That arrogant look made me afraid – afraid of her, as always.
str_A9D3AB2F: Better tell me, when will you tell everyone the truth?
str_232D5AEE: I opened my eyes and saw the outlines of a familiar apartment.
str_C113EB03: Never have I been so happy to wake up.
str_390CAEEC: After lying down for a while and coming to my senses, I was again faced with the thought that reality was not as rosy as I would have liked.
str_1A5ABEDE: This dream was only confirmation that I needed to find out what happened that night.
str_9B466B81: It's my only chance to get out of this city a free person.
str_C8E8347D: With the realization of reality, I felt pain all over my body, especially in my legs.
str_874A2CB6: Pulling back the blanket, I saw that all the sheets were covered in blood, and my legs were covered in deep cuts.
str_3D0E35D4: How is all of this possible?
str_72233C1C: And why is it happening to me?
str_E1057CF4: I couldn't answer a single question, and the only thing I understood was that time was not on my side.
str_BB5CD96B: I need to get out of this city.
str_D084656B: I need to find out who killed her and prove my innocence.
str_31DAC364: I must pull myself together, no matter what, and go back.
str_97792DF3: But first, I need to get myself cleaned up.
str_84D8FD12: 7.113 It's worth getting closer to the officer
str_996D44B4: I decided to go back to the beach and look along the way for people who might have seen us that night.
str_C6564A54: Unable to resist, I called the officer and arranged to meet him again on the beach.
str_A6925257: The whole way I thought only about what could be behind that night.
str_BDC7D8DC: And what do I need to do next?
str_D16BD643: Try to convince the detective that Mark is the killer.
str_6D18651A: Try to convince the detective that Edwin is the killer.
str_6CB68DED: Try to convince the detective that Tom is the killer.
str_4B6B2CF9: Try to convince the detective that the old man is the killer.
str_A1566408: Mark has been acting a bit strange these days, but could he have done something like that?
str_7668B274: Hmm, Edwin doesn't look like a killer at all.
str_A9775FA6: Tom is too strange. Why is he always around when something strange happens?
str_23708215: Who could it be if not him?
str_8E3CC976: No, I don't have evidence to accuse anyone.
str_8F8E1DCD: There's something wrong with this place. The things happening to me can't be explained so easily.
str_1F87ECF5: I didn't even notice how I ended up on the beach.
str_116D3A0A: The officer was already there, gazing into the distance of the blue expanse.
str_5BD65BE4: I hope you have some information for me.
str_B58C9A87: Alice, the bad news is that Miranda's blood was on your clothes, and your DNA was under her fingernails.
str_9220529F: But, it wasn't mine. That evening, I was wearing her clothes...
str_7A65811D: Unfortunately, those were the clothes you were wearing when you arrived at the station.
str_ABF1B406: God... How can everything be so bad? And my DNA... Where could that come from... It's most likely an accident...
str_81F5BFF1: You set up the tent incorrectly.
str_D4A9577D: You set up the tent correctly.
str_04629969: Since the tent was washed out to sea, we have no traces of other DNA. Only yours.
str_0916B56E: But, Alice, we found something else. A man's DNA in the tent.
str_D694BE7D: I've already spoken with him, and he admitted to being intimate with Miranda that night. But he left before the estimated time of the murder.
str_990F08E8: Still, for now, he has an alibi, and you don't. Plus, her blood was on you.
str_843F9814: Was her blood really on my clothes?
str_F809BE54: Just a drop, but that's enough to be convicted of murder.
str_B0311466: Tom's words started spinning in my head.
str_C0F6584F: It doesn't matter who killed Miranda anymore. What matters is that I don't want to lose everything because of this.
str_80AA7640: Please, you have to help me! It definitely wasn't me.
str_E925E15A: Alice, I can't help you. I can only follow the evidence.
str_A4F35F5D: You have a bad relationship with the Detective.
str_04680695: Alice, I really want to help you.
str_DCE2C93D: You have a good relationship with the Detective.
str_E26A5A98: The officer looked at me with such sympathy.
str_BF32F297: Maybe he has feelings for me...
str_2B1F6172: Should I try to get closer to him?
str_ED25F172: I shouldn't take advantage of this.
str_EDDDE0DD: Alice, what was your relationship with Miranda really like?
str_D28C46B7: Miranda always got me into trouble.
str_ED42E6C2: I never left Miranda in trouble.
str_05788CA2: Complicated. She always manipulated me and got me into trouble.
str_54697F79: I think she got into some kind of trouble here too.
str_B1DBEA91: She always had complicated relationships with men; I'm afraid that's what caused her death.
str_6D4D683E: But several witnesses indicate that you had a conflict that night.
str_CFBBC2A3: I don't remember that night, but I couldn't have hurt her.
str_C6AFD155: I think Mark is the killer.
str_AF4F9BDD: I saw something at the club, he was arguing with a girl.
str_BBF043F8: Yes, but the reason for the argument... He was cruel to that girl and tried to strangle her.
str_5088D694: And that's not all. He... I think he showed such tendencies towards me as well.
str_6DF8C31A: And strangulation marks were exactly what were found on Miranda's body.
str_180A161A: Alice, this is very important information.
str_9FA60910: Now the officer will consider Mark a suspect.
str_BC0C9D3E: I think Edwin is the killer.
str_223E53DB: I don't know... I have a feeling...
str_CEF8CDC7: I think Tom, the guy we met near the club, is the killer.
str_8875C1C6: He always ended up where we were. And he acts very strangely.
str_198635C4: Alice, unfortunately, I haven't encountered anyone resembling him or anyone with that name here.
str_DC1A8ABA: You need to describe him to me. I'll make a composite sketch and search for him more thoroughly.
str_8E606FDB: I described Tom's appearance in detail to the officer, and now I can only hope that he finds him.
str_650C9914: I think that nasty old man we saw on the beach did it.
str_F4D5C5D4: I doubt it. He has an alibi for that evening.
str_74C89D59: But what if it's not true, what if he lied?
str_5C3D6D52: I don't think so, I didn't find any evidence against him.
str_FC400AB4: I have no idea who it could be.
str_9CE29D12: Too bad, I was hoping you would clarify this situation.
str_E246EC6E: I think something supernatural is going on here.
str_E86C92EE: I don't know, but strange things are happening to me, I see things that aren't there.
str_AF110BFE: Alice, that happens when people experience trauma. It's not uncommon for victims.
str_A9247CFD: I have no one here but you.
str_BA262AC2: I slowly approached the detective and buried my head in his chest.
str_AF75D1B4: I felt his heart begin to beat faster.
str_05DDBE92: I raised my head and pulled his face towards me to passionately press my lips to his.
str_77B20AC1: I raised my head and lightly touched his cheek with my hand, and my lips gently touched his.
str_9354B4C3: I squeezed his torso tighter with my arms and continued to listen to the beating of his heart.
str_760534DC: What are you doing to me...
str_01D13B0B: The officer hugged me, and we stood like that for a few more minutes.
str_E26855E8: Let's take a walk along the beach. I don't want to go back to the station.
str_064B7729: Of course, I feel much calmer when you're near.
str_A1A4F7D4: Without saying a word, just gazing into the distance.
str_05882E72: It seemed Charles was enjoying these moments of calm, a slight smile playing on his face.
str_CA2BF9FA: You know, even though I live here, I rarely get to swim in the sea.
str_04E23C05: So let's swim now, I have a swimsuit with me.
str_915B972A: You just shine, does work really take away such wonderful moments from life?
str_541F8ADD: We entered the water, and the officer smiled almost childishly, feeling the gentle waves and the heat of the midday sun.
str_99B45BB4: I watched as he dove into the water, swiftly swimming from side to side.
str_DF846886: After playing enough, he finally paid attention to me.
str_D0B9EE37: Yes. I'm so tired of this. Sometimes I just want to run away and start over.
str_AF015EBA: Now that's my dream too – to run away.
str_FB3DBED7: I'll try to do everything to help you.
str_E663DF6A: Officer Garcia approached me and looked into my eyes, which had tears gathering in the corners.
str_64EDB484: The realization that this whole world could be hidden from me behind prison bars again seized my mind.
str_4AF4EE3C: Pain and resentment made me cling to his body in search of protection.
str_2C8693B2: Charles kissed me gently and pulled me close.
str_25408CA0: I have to use him. I have no other choice.
str_DF460C47: I shouldn't use him. I'm not that kind of person.
str_3EC0D0FA: You are trying with all your might to avoid prison!
str_CEDB39F5: You prefer not to resort to lies and manipulation.
str_9CFEFAFE: We swam a little more, and then sat on the sand admiring the sea.
str_DAEC5FB3: I sat on the sand a little longer, waiting to meet at least someone on this beach.
str_73E0040F: The deserted place never gained new visitors.
str_048D3501: When I was about to leave, my attention was caught by a person's silhouette.
str_EDBEBBE1: I see fate has brought us together again.
str_1C841205: I wanted to ask you, did you see anything strange on the beach?
str_BEF4BD5D: On the night before our last meeting.
str_5ECEA293: Oh, dear. I didn't see anything.
str_BDF11DE4: My friend was killed that night.
